mapper.select: SELECT a.* FROM assignment a INNER JOIN student_course sc ON a.course_id = sc.course_id WHERE sc.student_id = #{studentId} AND a.due_date IS NOT NULL AND a.due_date BETWEEN CURDATE() AND DATE_ADD(CURDATE(), INTERVAL #{days} DAY) AND NOT EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM assignment_submission s WHERE s.assignment_id = a.id AND s.student_id = #{studentId} ) ORDER BY a.due_date ASC
